segments.text: That was probably at Summit a while back, right?
segments.original_text: ちょっと前のねサミットかな

segments.text: After I saw it at Summit
segments.original_text: サミットで見てからね

segments.text: Still hasn't reached that level from Summit though
segments.original_text: サミットのスローンにはまだなってないよ
サミットの頃だったんです

full_text: That was probably at Summit a while back, right? After I saw it at Summit I'm already sold on that Still hasn't reached that level from Summit though That was back during Summit Yeah, next one
